---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---


```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(tidymodels)
library(themis)
library(yardstick)
library(dplyr)

data("clients")

clients$Exited <- factor(clients$Exited)
clients$HasCrCard <- factor(clients$HasCrCard)
clients$IsActiveMember <- factor(clients$IsActiveMember)

set.seed(12345)
train_test_split <- initial_split(clients, strata = Exited)
client_train <- training(train_test_split)
client_test <- testing(train_test_split)
```

```{r}
receta_avanzada <- recipe(Exited ~ ., data = client_train) %>%
  update_role(Exited, new_role = "outcome") %>%
  step_rm(CustomerId, Surname, HasCrCard) %>%
  
  step_mutate(
    BalanceSalaryRatio = ifelse(EstimatedSalary > 0, Balance / EstimatedSalary, 0),
    NumOfProducts_grouped = factor(ifelse(NumOfProducts >= 3, "3+", as.character(NumOfProducts))),
    is_germany = ifelse(Geography == "Germany", 1, 0),
    Gender_Active = factor(paste(Gender, ifelse(IsActiveMember == 1, "Activo", "Inactivo")))
  ) %>%
  step_rm(NumOfProducts, EstimatedSalary) %>% 
  
  step_impute_median(all_numeric_predictors()) %>%
  step_impute_mode(all_nominal_predictors()) %>%
  step_dummy(all_nominal_predictors()) %>%
  step_center(all_numeric_predictors()) %>%
  step_scale(all_numeric_predictors()) 
```

```{r}
rf_spec <- rand_forest() %>% set_engine("ranger") %>% set_mode("classification")

xgb_spec <- boost_tree(trees = 300, tree_depth = tune(), learn_rate = tune()) %>%
  set_engine("xgboost") %>% set_mode("classification")

nn_spec <- mlp(hidden_units = tune(), epochs = tune()) %>%
  set_engine("nnet") %>% set_mode("classification")
```

```{r}
set.seed(123)
folds <- vfold_cv(client_train, v = 3)

rf_wkflw <- workflow() %>% add_recipe(receta_avanzada) %>% add_model(rf_spec)
rf_fit <- fit(rf_wkflw, data = client_train)

xgb_wkflw <- workflow() %>% add_recipe(receta_avanzada) %>% add_model(xgb_spec)
xgb_tuned <- tune_grid(xgb_wkflw, resamples = folds, grid = 5, metrics = metric_set(f_meas))
best_xgb <- select_best(xgb_tuned, metric = "f_meas")
xgb_fit <- finalize_workflow(xgb_wkflw, best_xgb) %>% fit(data = client_train)

nn_wkflw <- workflow() %>% add_recipe(receta_avanzada) %>% add_model(nn_spec)
nn_tuned <- tune_grid(nn_wkflw, resamples = folds, grid = 5, metrics = metric_set(f_meas))
best_nn <- select_best(nn_tuned, metric = "f_meas")
nn_fit <- finalize_workflow(nn_wkflw, best_nn) %>% fit(data = client_train)
```

```{r}
umbral <- 0.3
aplicar_umbral <- function(modelo_fit, datos, nombre_modelo) {
  prob <- predict(modelo_fit, new_data = datos, type = "prob")
  
  datos %>%
    select(Exited) %>%
    bind_cols(prob) %>%
    mutate(
     .pred_class_umbral = factor(ifelse(.pred_1 >= umbral, "1", "0"), levels = c("0", "1")),
      Modelo = nombre_modelo
    )
}

preds_rf_adv <- aplicar_umbral(rf_fit, client_test, "Random Forest")
preds_xgb_adv <- aplicar_umbral(xgb_fit, client_test, "XGBoost")
preds_nn_adv <- aplicar_umbral(nn_fit, client_test, "Red Neuronal")

prob_media_test <- (predict(xgb_fit, new_data = client_test, type = "prob")$.pred_1 + 
                    predict(rf_fit, new_data = client_test, type = "prob")$.pred_1) / 2
preds_ensemble_adv <- client_test %>%
  select(Exited) %>%
  mutate(
    .pred_0 = 1 - prob_media_test,
    .pred_1 = prob_media_test,
    .pred_class_umbral = factor(ifelse(.pred_1 >= umbral, "1", "0"), levels = c("0", "1")),
    Modelo = "Ensemble (XGB+RF)"
  )
todas_las_preds_adv <- bind_rows(preds_rf_adv, preds_xgb_adv, preds_nn_adv, preds_ensemble_adv)
```

```{r}
comparativa_f1_adv <- todas_las_preds_adv %>%
  group_by(Modelo) %>%
  f_meas(truth = Exited, estimate = .pred_class_umbral, event_level = "second") %>%
  arrange(desc(.estimate))

print(comparativa_f1_adv)

library(ggplot2)
ggplot(comparativa_f1_adv, aes(x = reorder(Modelo, .estimate), y = .estimate, fill = Modelo)) +
  geom_col() +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_minimal() +
  expand_limits(y = 1.0) + 
  labs(title = paste("Comparativa F1-Score Variables Sintéticas"),
       x = "Modelo",
       y = "F1-Score") +
  geom_text(aes(label = round(.estimate, 3)), hjust = -0.2)
```

```{r}

library(vip)

xgb_fit %>% 
  extract_fit_parsnip() %>% 
  vip(geom = "col", num_features = 15) + 
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Importancia de las Variables (XGBoost)",
       x = "Importancia",
       y = "Variables")

```

```{r}
data("clients_kaggle")
clients_kaggle$HasCrCard <- factor(clients_kaggle$HasCrCard)
clients_kaggle$IsActiveMember <- factor(clients_kaggle$IsActiveMember)

pred <- predict(rf_fit, new_data = clients_kaggle, type = "prob")
prediccion_kaggle <-factor(ifelse(pred$.pred_1 >= umbral, "1", "0"), levels = c("0", "1"))

submission <- clients_kaggle %>% 
  select(CustomerId) %>% 
  bind_cols(Exited = prediccion_kaggle)
    
 write.csv(submission, "modelo_mejorado.csv", row.names = FALSE, quote = FALSE)
```


```{r}
data("clients_kaggle")

clients_kaggle$HasCrCard <- factor(clients_kaggle$HasCrCard)
clients_kaggle$IsActiveMember <- factor(clients_kaggle$IsActiveMember)

prob_xgb_kaggle <- predict(xgb_fit, new_data = clients_kaggle, type = "prob")

prob_rf_kaggle <- predict(rf_fit, new_data = clients_kaggle, type = "prob")

prob_media_kaggle <- (prob_xgb_kaggle$.pred_1 + prob_rf_kaggle$.pred_1) / 2

prediccion_kaggle <- factor(ifelse(prob_media_kaggle >= umbral, "1", "0"), levels = c("0", "1"))

submission <- clients_kaggle %>% 
  select(CustomerId) %>% 
  bind_cols(Exited = prediccion_kaggle)

write.csv(submission, "modelo_ensemble.csv", row.names = FALSE, quote = FALSE)


```
